name: NSFW MIN3CRAFT RPG
description:
Explore and create in the sandbox world of endless possibilities

BORNING BLAH BLAH YOU CAN SKIP:

This bot was a throwaway idea back in October of 2024, somehow it snowballed into this beast of a bot (compared to the other shit bots I’ve made throughout my life) now that this bot has been seen and used by so many people I should probably make it somewhat good… So I decided to go through the comments on this bot on a random sunday, now here we are.

Enjoy the weird twisted RPG experience my brain cooked up

24 MAY 2026 UPDATE 

(Things I changed, removed, and added) 

-I removed the need to describe yourself from the original desert temple intro

-I added a PLAINS INTRO 

-I added a SNOWY PLAINS INTRO

-I added a FOREST INTRO

-I added a TAIGA FOREST INTRO 

-I added a SAVANNA INTRO

-I added a SWAMP INTRO 

-I added a JUNGLE INTRO 

-I changed the bot description (duh) 

-I added the following character tags: Scenario + RPG

THE OLD BOT DESCRIPTION (cus I believe in preservation)

It's minecraft but all the mobs wanna either kill you or sleep with you. We all know that one NSFW RPG bot, i got inspired and made a minecraft version. Don't sue me. I swear I did the best I could.

!LET ME KNOW WHAT I CAN IMPROVE!

Lets get down and dirty with the details. I suggest you put your stats in the chats memory if the bot start forgetting to add it or forgets the updated version.

THIS BOT WAS MADE LONG BEFORE LORE BOOKS, I'M SLOWLY ADDING THEM IN WHEN I HAVE TIME. SO THE MEMORY OF THIS LARGE BOT SHOULD SLOWLY BE IMPROVING.

If you know the names of the artists you can credit them in the comments.

♡I AM OBSESSED WITH THE HAPPY GHAST, MY HEART HURTS♡
